title: Delete key-value pairs
excerpt: description: Remove keys and their associated values from a Workers KV namespace using the delete() method. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/kv/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. To delete a key-value pair, call the `delete()` method of the [KV binding](https://developers.cloudflare.com/kv/concepts/kv-bindings/) on any [KV namespace](https://developers.cloudflare.com/kv/concepts/kv-namespaces/) you have bound to your Worker code: An example of deleting a key-value pair from within a Worker:
